text: Agitation / Arousal Chart for elderly 1) Risperidone 0.25mg PO, r/v in 2hrs max. 4mg / day 2) Lorazepam 0.5mg PO, r/v 1hr max. 4mg / day 3) Haloperidol 0.25 - 0.5 mg (max 1mg) PO/IM, r/v 1hr max. 4mg / day ANALGESIA SIMPLE Paracetamol (500mg) PO/IV 1g QID Panadol Osteo (665mg) PO 1-2 tabs, TDS COMBINATION Panadeine (500/8mg) PO 1-2 tabs, QID-TDS (6-8h) Panadeine Forte (500/30mg) PO 1-2 tabs, 3-6 hrly (max 8 tabs) Nurofen Plus (200/12.8mg) PO 1-2 tabs, QID-TDS (6-8h) NSAIDS Ibuprofen (Advil/Nurofen) PO 200mg-400mg, 6-8 hrly Diclofenac (Voltaren) PO/PR 75-150mg OD Naproxen (Naprosyn) PO 250-500mg, (max 1250mg daily) Indomethacin (Indocid) PO/PR, 75-100mg (2 tabs) 8 hrly Ketorolac (Toradol) PO 10mg QID, IM 10-30mg 6 daily. OPIOIDS Tramadol IR PO/IV/IM 50-100mg QID Tramadol SR PO 100-200mg BD Oxycodone IR (Oxynorm) PO 5-20mg PRN (1-8hrly) Oxycodone SR (Oxycontin) PO BD (adjust dose to 24hr IR use) Morphine Sulphate PO 0.1-0.2mg/kg (60min lag effect) S/C 0.1mg/kg IM 2.5-10mg 3hrly (30min lag effect) IV 1mg-10mg (15min lag effect) PCA 1mg bolus/5mins Buprenorphine TOP 5,10,20 mcg/hr, wkly S/L 200 mcg 4° Reverse Opioids Naloxone IV 200 microg boluses, every 5min APERIENTS Coloxyl / Senna (softener) PO 1-2 tabs BD Movicol (stimulant) PO 1-3 sachets BD Lactulose (osmotic) PO 15-45mL OD or split BD Glycerol (osmotic) PR supp if BNO 2/7 Microlax (osmotic saline lax) PR 1-2 if BNO 2-3/7 Fleet Enema PR if BNO 3/7 Colonlitely (bowel prep) Prior to colonoscopy ELECTROLYTES Potassium (KCl) ! KCl Elixir Slow K approx 6mmol IV 20mmol / 1L NS max rate: IV 10mmol / 100ml NS 10mmol / hr PO 30ml approx 1.0 plasma K PO 1-3 tabs BD Magnesium (MgCl) Magmin IV 10mmol . 100ml NS rate: 1hr PO 1-2 tabs BD Calcium Gluconate 10% PO 10mL Phosphate (use protocol) Phosphate Sandoz (PO IV 10mmol / 250ml NS rate: 1hr PO 500-1000mg TDS DVT PROPHYLAXIS Non-ambulant Medical Admit Enoxaparin S/C 40mg OD General Surgery Heparin S/C 5000 units BD Orthopaedic Enoxaparin S/C 40mg OD Orthopaedic d/c post TKR Aspirin PO 150mg OD 4/52 SEDATIVES Temazepam PO 5-20mg NOCTE Insomnia Diazepam PO 1-10mg TDS Anxiety / Agitation Lorazepam PO 0.5-1mg PRN 4hrly PO 1-2mg NOCTE Anxiety / Agitation Insomnia Midazolam IV/IM 0.1-0.2mg/kg Seizures VITAMINS / MINERALS Actonel Combi D (Risendronate / Ca Risendronate PO 35mg, weekly Ca/Calciferol PO 1250mg OD Folate Ferrous Sulphate PO 350mg MANE PO 100-200mg OD Thiamine PO/IM 100mg OD Strontium PO 2g NOCTE FLUIDS N/S 1L 8hr N/S 1L + 20mmol KCl 8hr CSL 1L 8hr Bolus 250 mL - N/S or Gelofusin STAT Packed RBC 1hr FFP 1hr ALTERED MENTAL STATE ? Medications Sedatives, Anti-HTN, Narcotics CHECK: Hx, Obs, BSL, GCS, ECG, Med Chart Examine: CNS, CVS, id any injury MSK DOCUMENT r/v in 1-4hrs HTN (sBP >190) >90% Essential ? Meds not given ? APO ? AMI ? SAH ? Eclampsia ? Dissection - L/R BP & Pulse diff. CERTIFYING DEATH Wait 30-60mins Verbal Response Pain Response Pupillary Response Check chest - Insp/Expiration Palp carotid pulse + Ausc heart - 1min Certify deceased + time Check admission notes Notify: - NOK - Consultant - GP Record all in Pt. notes Death Certificate - NOT Urgent HypoTENSION (hTN) ? Pt. Stable Shocked or Not??? sBP <80mmHg = MET & call Reg ? Hypovolamia ? Dry - Bolus 250mL ? Bleeding - GI (PR) ? 3rd spacing ? Vasodilation ? Sepsis ? Meds: Anti-HTN, Opiates, Epidural, GTN ? Anaphylaxis ? Acute Adrenal Insuf ? Pump ACS / Arrythmia PE / PTx Tamponade ? Normal 4 Pt Sedatives, Anti-HTN, Narcotics ANTIEMETICS Metoclopramide (Maxalon) PO/IM/IV 5-10mg TDS Prochlorperazine (Stematil) PO 20mg STAT or 5-10mg TDS IV/IM 12.5mg TDS Ondansetron (Zofran) PO/SL 4-8mg TDS Droperidol IV/IM 0.625-1.25mg (Max 2.5mg) Tropisitron PO 5mg OD IV 2-5mg OD Domperidone PO 10mg TDS FEBRILE Pt. (T>38°C) ? Duration Spiking, Swinging, Constant Post-op Atelectasis, Pneumonia ? Infection Resp, UTI, IVC lines, Sepsis, Meningism ? Thrombosis PE, DVT, MI ECG, Vitals ? Medication W/D, Allergy, Transfusion CHECK: Obs, Med Chart, Fluid Chart Hx + Examine: Resp, Wounds, Ix: FBC, MSU, CXR, BCs APO L - Frusemide (Lasix) IV 40mg STAT M - Morphine IV 2-8mg 2-4hrly N - GTN IV 5-10 microg/ min (keep BP >100) O - Oxygen aPO2 >60mmHg (HM, CPAP) P - Post. & PEEP Sit upright Low UO (<30mL/hr) PRE-RENAL RENAL POST-RENAL Hypovolemia - Intake / Output, Bleeding, Fever, Vomit, Diarrhoea Sepsis, Vasodilation ATN (2° to pre-renal) Infection Upper Obstruction: Stone, Clot, Slough HypoTN - AMI, PE, Arrythmias Drugs Drugs - IVAB, NSAIDs, ACE, ARB, Contrast Lower Obstruction: Stone, BPH, Clot, IDC Warfarin REVERSAL (INR >1.5) (check back of anticoag chart) FFP d/w Med / Haem Reg Prothrombinex Vit K PO 1-2mg IV 0.5-1mg Common ANTIBIOTICS Augmentin Duo Forte 875/125mg PO 1 tab BD, 5/7 Augmentin 500/125mg PO 1 tab BD, 5/7 Cephalexin PO 0.5-1g QID-BD Ceftriaxone IM/IV 1-2g OD or split BD Ciprofloxacin PO 250-500mg BD IV 2-300mg BD, up to 3-400mg TDS, max 1.2g daily Gentamicin IM/IV 5-7mg/kg OD Meropenem IV 0.5-1g TDS Metronidazole PO 400mg BD Tazocin IV 4.5g TDS Vencomycin IV 1-1.5g BD req monitoring Anti-HTN ACE-I Enalapril PO 2.5mg BD ARB Irbesartan PO 150mg OD β-Blocker Metoprolol PO 25mg BD IV 2.5mg bolus CCB Diltiazem SR Amlodipine Verapamil IR SR PO 180mg OD PO 2.5mg OD PO 40mg BD/TDS 120mg OD IV 2.5mg bolus Diuretics: - Loop Frusemide - K+ Spare Spironolact. Amiloride - Thiazide Indapamide HCT ! PO 20mg OD PO 25mg OD PO 5mg OD PO 1.25mg OD PO 12.5mg OD ACS M - Morphine IV titrate 2.5-5mg O - Oxygen N - GTN S/L tab 0.3mg (start), spray 0.4mg A - Aspirin Clopidogrel PO 300mg PO 300mg +/- sit up, antiemetic Hyperkalaemia If ECG changes or K+ >7 mmol/L = start Tx immediately. In other cases 1st exclude spurious hyperkalaemia (eg haemolysed specimen) Causes: renal failure (rare in N renal fxn), others: meds that incr K, tissue damage, acidosis Stabilise Cardiac Cell IV (slow) Ca Gluconate or CaCl Promote Cell Uptake of K+ IV Glucose + insulin infusion IV/INH Salbutamol IV NaHCO3 Promote K+ excretion after emergency Frusemide, Resonium
